# `polars math exp` for [dataframe](/commands/categories/dataframe.md)

<div class='command-title'>Compute element-wise e raised to the power of a column expression.</div>

## Signature

```> polars math exp {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input             | output            |
| ----------------- | ----------------- |
| polars_expression | polars_expression |
| polars_selector   | polars_expression |
## Examples

Compute element-wise e raised to the power of a column
```nu
> [[a]; [0] [1] [2]] |
    polars into-df |
    polars select (polars col a | polars math exp) |
    polars collect

```
